mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (id, user_id, type, payload) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{payload})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, type, payload, read_at AS readAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, type, payload, read_at AS readAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
UPDATE notifications SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
